_meta.title: Agency Group — Migration Registry & Backup Manifest

migration_registry.description: Changes learning_events.lead_id / deal_id from INTEGER to TEXT (UUID-compatible). Adds correlation_id, session_id, source_system columns. Creates 5 event-bus indexes.
migration_registry.rollback_risk: LOW — column type revert to INT is the only risk, only if UUID values were written

migration_registry.description: Rewrites sync_deal_expected_fee() to use portal-compat columns (fase/valor) instead of broken stage/gci_net references. Drops and recreates trg_deals_fee_sync trigger.
migration_registry.rollback_risk: NONE — previous trigger was already broken (crashes on any deal save)

migration_registry.description: Adds increment_deal_pack_view_count(pack_id UUID) RPC for atomic view_count increment. Also ensures metadata + ai_summary columns exist on deal_packs.
migration_registry.rollback_risk: LOW — callers gracefully handle RPC absence

migration_registry.description: Replaces USING(true) permissive RLS policies with agent-email isolation. Contacts and deals: agents see only their own records. Properties: authenticated read-all (listings are public), anon read active-only. Deal packs: created_by scoped.
migration_registry.rollback_risk: MEDIUM — reverting to USING(true) re-opens cross-agent data visibility
migration_registry.note: All API routes use service_role key — unaffected by RLS. Only Supabase SDK direct client calls are gated.

migration_registry.description: Creates organizations + org_members tables. Inserts default Agency Group org (UUID: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001). Adds nullable tenant_id FK to 8 tables. Backfills all existing rows. Creates v_tenant_isolation_readiness view and get_tenant_id_for_email() helper. RLS enforcement NOT activated.
migration_registry.rollback_risk: LOW — nullable columns, no enforcement active, additive only
migration_registry.blocking_note: Tenant RLS enforcement BLOCKED: JWT does not yet include tenant_id claim. Set TENANT_ISOLATION_ENABLED=true only after JWT hook is configured in Supabase Dashboard → Auth → Hooks.

migration_registry.description: 15+ composite/partial indexes covering pipeline analytics, deal pack queries, contact dormant detection, match scoring, kpi_snapshots time-series, and properties search.

Creates audit_log table with JSONB old_data/new_data, changed_columns[], actor context, and tenant isolation. PostgreSQL triggers on deals (INSERT/UPDATE of revenue columns/DELETE) and deal_packs (INSERT/UPDATE status/view_count/sent_at). Helper functions: enrich_audit_actor() and purge_old_audit_logs().
migration_registry.rollback_risk: LOW — DROP TABLE destroys audit history; triggers are removed cleanly

core_tables.name: deals
core_tables.description: Pipeline deals in PT real estate lifecycle
core_tables.critical_note: Uses TEXT valor (€ 1.250.000 format), TEXT fase (PT stage names) — NOT BIGINT deal_value / stage enum

core_tables.name: properties
core_tables.rls_mode: authenticated read-all, anon active-only, agent write own

event_tables.name: learning_events
event_tables.description: Event bus — all system actions tracked here

full_rollback.execution: Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor → paste rollback.sql → Run
full_rollback.data_loss_risk: audit_log table data lost (new, empty). All other data preserved.

partial_rollback.description: Undo only the most recent migration
instructions: Identify the failing migration from Supabase logs
Run only the corresponding R-section (e.g. R7 for 20260430_004)

emergency_rls_rollback.description: If agents cannot see their data after RLS migration

tenant_lockout_prevention.description: If tenant isolation accidentally locks all queries
tenant_lockout_prevention.note: TENANT_ISOLATION_ENABLED is false by default. No tenant RLS is active. No lockout possible from these migrations alone.
tenant_lockout_prevention.safeguard: Migration 20260430_002 explicitly states enforcement is BLOCKED pending JWT customization

vercel_env_vars.TENANT_ISOLATION_ENABLED: false (default — do not change until JWT is configured)

coverage_areas: Revenue calculation chain (PT number format parsing)
